commit.message:
Add tournament system with flexible player count and single elimination brackets

- New Tournament model with flexible player count (min 2, no max)
- Single elimination bracket with byes for non-power-of-2 player counts
- PongEngine skipPayout option for tournament matches (no per-match payout)
- Full tournament lifecycle: create, join, escrow, play rounds, payout winner
- Winner takes 90% of total pot (8% burn, 2% fee)
- Bracket visualization modal with live match status
- Tournament list in play modal with create form and progress bars
- Automatic round advancement with 10s delay between rounds
- Disconnect handling: forfeit during match, removal during waiting phase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix false-positive test for NoteActivity text reference resolution (#19)

## Summary
- Reference resolution in `NoteActivityConverter` was already correctly
implemented
- The `test_resolves_text_reference` test was a false positive due to
incorrect document structure
- Fixed the test and added edge case coverage

## What was wrong
The test passed a `<section>` fragment to `wrap_in_ccda_document()`,
which wraps content inside `<entry>` tags. This created invalid
`<entry><section>...</section></entry>` nesting. The `Entry` model has
no `section` field, so the parser silently dropped the inner section.
The test then matched against the **document-level** DocumentReference's
raw XML (which contained the assertion text literally), not the Note
Activity DR.

## What changed
- Rewrote `test_resolves_text_reference` with a full inline
ClinicalDocument and correct `<section><text>...<entry><act>` structure
- Added assertion on type code `34109-9` to guard against matching the
document-level DR
- Added `test_reference_to_missing_id_uses_data_absent_reason` for
unresolvable references
- Removed unused `pytest` import

## Test plan
- [x] `test_resolves_text_reference` passes with correct Note Activity
DR
- [x] `test_reference_to_missing_id_uses_data_absent_reason` verifies
graceful fallback
- [x] All 24 note tests pass
- [x] Multiple references edge case already covered by
`TestNoteMultipleContent`

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Over-Scaled workloads detection tab to Autoscaler page

- New backend endpoint GET /api/v1/autoscaler/overscaled that detects
  workloads with HPAs/KEDA that have been scaled up but have very low
  actual CPU/memory utilization
- Calculates optimal replica count based on actual usage at 70% target
  utilization, floored at HPA min replicas
- Severity: critical (<5% CPU eff), warning (<20%), info (<40%)
- Shows excess replicas, wasted cost, and actionable reason
- Dashboard: new "Over-Scaled" tab in Autoscaler page with KPIs,
  sortable/filterable table, and CSV export
- Also fixes autoscaler events source badge for Karpenter/ClusterAutoscaler

commit.message:
fix(auth): proxy utilise admin client pour les requêtes DB

auth.uid() est NULL dans le contexte PostgREST du proxy/middleware
(@supabase/ssr limitation). Les requêtes organizations/memberships
passaient par RLS et retournaient zéro résultat → boucle redirect.

Fix : le proxy utilise un client admin (service_role) pour les
vérifications org/membership. C'est sûr car l'user est déjà
authentifié via getUser() (appel Auth API direct, fonctionne).

report_service.py :
- _hacker_scenarios(findings, lang) : filtre les findings CRITICAL/HIGH
  et mappe chacun sur un scénario d'attaque concret (8 scénarios couverts :
  RDP/SMB ransomware, base de données exposée, FTP/Telnet sniffing,
  SSL/TLS man-in-the-middle, SPF/DMARC phishing, WordPress brute-force,
  version vulnérable RCE, réputation/blacklist)

  impact business, diagram_target

report_template.html :
- Section conditionnelle (affichée seulement si hacker_scenarios non vide)
- Pour chaque scénario : carte sombre avec en-tête navy, temps d'exploitation
  en rouge, narration attaquant + impact business en rouge, diagramme

commit.message:
Session 6b: fix duplicate text extraction via processed set propagation

Five coordinated fixes to prevent duplicate text in PPTX output:
- List handler marks all descendants (not just LIs) as processed
- Shape text capture marks descendants when text is captured
- Text element handler (P, H1-H6) marks descendants as processed
- Div-text fallback skips extraction when children have visual fills
- Div-text fallback marks descendants when extracted

Reduces element counts where duplicates existed (hr-skills 96->88,
sample-slide 8->4) with no regressions on other fixtures.

commit.message:
Add eSSL Card Reader simulator with 90 days of test data

Create comprehensive Docker-based simulator for testing eSSL connector:

Features:
- MySQL 8.0 database with eSSL schema (AccessLogs, Users, Doors)
- Data generator creating 90 days of realistic card swipe events
- 400 simulated users (students, faculty, staff, visitors)
- 50,000-70,000 total events with temporal patterns
- 10 entry points across simulated campus
- Realistic behavior patterns (morning rush, lunch, evening departure)
- Anomalies for testing (late night access, tailgating, unusual patterns)

Files:
- init.sql: Database schema matching eSSL X990/K90 series
- generate_data.py: Python script generating realistic events
- docker-compose.simulators.yml: Docker Compose configuration
- test_connector.py: Verification script for connector testing
- README.md: Comprehensive documentation

Usage:
1. docker-compose -f docker-compose.simulators.yml up -d essl-mysql
2. docker-compose -f docker-compose.simulators.yml run --rm essl-data-generator
3. python essl_simulator/test_connector.py

Database accessible at localhost:3307 with credentials in README.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: allow DELETE in CORS, remove confirm() from deleteOffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix recovery flow for users with no provisionedSheetId in KV + speed up plates

When a returning user's KV record has no provisionedSheetId (deleted sheet
or legacy user predating that field), inspectProvisionedSheet returns
state:'unknown' with a null ssid. Previously this fell through to
respondRecoverReturningUser (error dialog). Now we treat unknown+null-ssid
the same as missing/trashed: reprovision a fresh sheet automatically.

Also bumps plate loading animation to 200ms intervals.

commit.message:
feat(sync): replace Stripe with Lemon Squeezy billing (Phase 3)

- billing.ts: Lemon Squeezy checkout URL creation + webhook handler
  - HMAC-SHA256 signature verification (constant-time compare)
  - subscription_created/resumed/unpaused → is_pro = 1
  - subscription_cancelled/expired/paused → is_pro = 0
  - workspace_id passed as custom_data through checkout flow
- schema.ts: add email, ls_customer_id to WorkspaceRow + COLUMN_MIGRATIONS
  - ALTER TABLE statements applied idempotently (try/catch per column)
  - Add LEMONSQUEEZY_* vars to Env interface
- index.ts: wire billing routes + Pro gating on sync endpoints
  - POST /billing/checkout → returns Lemon Squeezy checkout URL
  - POST /lemon/webhook → signature-verified subscription events
  - GET/POST /sync → 402 if not Pro (bypassed in development)
- wrangler.toml: add LEMONSQUEEZY_* env var stubs
